remarks.zh: 用于逐月动态计算贷款利息与本金明细。支持等额本息与等额本金两种模式切换，可精准查询任意特定期数的动态还款组成。参数说明：贷款本金为初始贷款总额；年利率支持输入5.5%或5.5；总期数为贷款总月数；当前期数为想查看的特定月份（如第1个月输入1）；还款模式通过列表选择等额本息或等额本金。
remarks.en: 用于逐月动态计算贷款利息与本金明细。支持等额本息与等额本金两种模式切换，可精准查询任意特定期数的动态还款组成。参数说明：贷款本金为初始贷款总额；年利率支持输入5.5%或5.5；总期数为贷款总月数；当前期数为想查看的特定月份（如第1个月输入1）；还款模式通过列表选择等额本息或等额本金。

remarks.zh: 本公式用于计算固定利率（Fix Rate）贷款的分期详情。适用场景包括固定利息的汽车贷款、商业设备贷或特定工程分期。输入说明：[总贷款]填写项目或物件总价；[首付]填写已付的Deposit金额；[贷款年限]填写整年数；[年利率]可直接输入百分比数字（如5.5）或小数（如0.055）。输出结果包含实际贷款额、总利息、总还款额及每月月供，数值均保留2位小数。
remarks.en: 本公式用于计算固定利率（Fix Rate）贷款的分期详情。适用场景包括固定利息的汽车贷款、商业设备贷或特定工程分期。输入说明：[总贷款]填写项目或物件总价；[首付]填写已付的Deposit金额；[贷款年限]填写整年数；[年利率]可直接输入百分比数字（如5.5）或小数（如0.055）。输出结果包含实际贷款额、总利息、总还款额及每月月供，数值均保留2位小数。

formulas.expression: {@D=[总贷款]-[首付]}{@I=if([年利率]>1,[年利率]/100,[年利率])}{@TI=@D*@I*[贷款年限]}{@TA=@D+@TI}{@M=@TA/([贷款年限]*12)}实际贷款额：{@D}&总利息：{round(@TI,2)}&总还款额：{round(@TA,2)}&每月还款额：{round(@M,2)}
formulas.author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 是总尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นการวัดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้บน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng số đo, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စာရင်းချုပ်တိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်ဘုတ်၊ အောက်ဘုတ်နှင့်ဘက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ ဖြစ်သည်၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ဘုတ်၏ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដង់ស្លឹកឈើសម្រាប់ទូ។ [ទទឹង], [កម្ពស់], [ជម្រៅ] គឺជាបរិមាណសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃសម្ភារៈបន្ទះលើ, បាត និងផ្នែកចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃសម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະ ໜາດ ຄະຕີນໍາສໍາ ລັບຕູ້, [ເວົ້າ], [ສູງ], [ຄວາມລຶກ] ແມ່ນມາດຕານສະ​ຫງວ່າຊີວິຫຼວງ, [BoardThick] ຄວາມ​ຫ ຟາດ​ຂອງ​ເຊົາ​ນໍ​ສະ​ຫງວ່າການ​ທົງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນ ໂຖນຄວາຍຂອງ​ພື້ນ​ໄລ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[幅], [高さ], [奥行]は全体寸法で、[BoardThick]は上板、下板、側板の材料厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背板の材料厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판 및 측면판 재료 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, y [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] correspondent aux dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, et [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Abmessungen der Platten für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] ऊपरी, निचली और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)

formulas.expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
formulas.author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 窗口制作的多行输出示例。根据需要调整偏移量。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output berbilang baris untuk pembuatan tingkap. Sesuaikan offset jika perlu. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Contoh keluaran berbaris banyak untuk pembuatan jendela. Sesuaikan offset sesuai kebutuhan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: ตัวอย่างผลลัพธ์แบบหลายบรรทัดสำหรับการผลิตหน้าต่าง ปรับออฟเซ็ตตามต้องการ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Ví dụ về đầu ra nhiều dòng cho việc chế tạo cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh độ lệch khi cần thiết. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang offsets kung kinakailangan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပြတင်းပေါက်လုပ်ငန်းအတွက် မျိုးစုံလိုင်းအထွက် နမူနာ။ လိုအပ်ပါက offset များကိုညှိပါ။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ឧទាហរណ៍នៃលទ្ធផលច្រើនបន្ទាត់សម្រាប់ការច្នៃផ្ទាំងបង្អួច។ ពិនិត្យនិងកែសម្រួល offset ដោយផ្អែកលើតម្រូវការ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງຂອງຜົນລັດຄວາມຢ່າງແມ່ນຍິ່ງສໍາລັບການຜະລິດປ່ອນ. ປັບແຕ່ງ offsets ຖ້າຈໍາເປັນ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: 窓製作のための複数行出力例です。必要に応じてオフセットを調整してください。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 창문 제작을 위한 다중 라인 출력 예제입니다. 필요에 따라 오프셋을 조정하세요. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Ejemplo de salida en varias líneas para la fabricación de ventanas. Ajuste las compensaciones si es necesario. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Exemple de sortie multi-lignes pour la fabrication de fenêtres. Ajustez les décalages si nécessaire. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Beispiel für mehrzeilige Ausgabe zur Fensterherstellung. Passen Sie die Offsets bei Bedarf an. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: खिड़की निर्माण के लिए बहु-पंक्ति आउटपुट का उदाहरण। आवश्यकतानुसार ऑफ़सेट समायोजित करें। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Пример многострочного вывода для изготовления окна. Корректируйте смещения при необходимости. (AI translated, please check)

formulas.expression: Frame Size: {[W]} x {[H]} & Glass Size: {[W]-50mm} x {[H]-50mm} & Seal Length: {([W]+[H])*2}
formulas.author: sheenhoong
